caption: A man with glasses, wearing a white long-sleeved shirt under a black embroidered vest and holding a guitar, stands before a microphone in an indoor setting. He is positioned against a background of horizontal light-brown wooden slats. Several people are visible from the back in the foreground, their heads partially obscuring the lower half of the man. On the right side of the scene, the text "ORCA" appears inside a dark purple speech bubble. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a similar pose, singing or speaking into the microphone, with slight shifts in his facial expression and head position. The guitar he holds is light-colored, and the microphone is mounted on a black stand extending from the left. The scene is stable, with no significant changes in location or the arrangement of the people and equipment.
